_comment: ADR 0052 §D2/§D7 — machine-readable release manifest and the single source of truth for REQUIRED UPGRADE STOPS. /cut-app-release PREPENDS each immutable vX.Y.Z release into `releases` (newest first) and sets `latest`. An upgrade tool reads `releases` to compute which required stops sit between a customer's current version and the target. `latest` names the newest stable (the moving alias the /install/ download points at). The per-entry field shape is documented in `_releaseShape` — that is a SCHEMA EXAMPLE, never a real release; do not parse it as one.
